Average gallon of gas is now $3.84, up from $2.92 a month ago, and inflation just came in hot for Feb:


Jamie Dupree (@jamiedupree)

WASHINGTON (AP) — Wholesale inflation comes in hot for February with producer prices rising 3.4%, the biggest jump in a year.

Regardless of what you think about Trump or the war in Iran, it is just remarkable to see Gabbard debase herself this way. Total, complete abandonment of everything she said was, said she stood for, and promised she’d do. Craven.


DNI Tulsi Gabbard (@DNIGabbard)

Donald Trump was overwhelmingly elected by the American people to be our President and Commander in Chief. As our Commander in Chief, he is responsible for determining what is and is not an imminent threat, and whether or not to take a

This article is compelling and smart. I’ve seen it forwarded around a lot.  Let’s walk through why it’s wrong. 

1. The author argues that Iran’s military infrastructure especially its drones and missiles are being systematically taken apart.  True. But in the aftermath who is going to keep it that way? After the 12 day war Israel and Trump declared Iran’s capacity to make war “obliterated” and set
On Truth Social, POTUS says he can't enlist the help of allies to open up Hormuz, and also that we don't need their help and never did:

Pretty compelling piece in al-Jazeera (!) today arguing that the U.S.-Israeli plan is working quite well: Trump has degraded Iran militarily, proxies are fragmenting, Strait of Hormuz pain being most felt by China, etc. Actually quite convincing. Curious for the dissents.

A very notable resignation from someone who is extremely well-respected in MAGA world. Will see if that holds after this letter -->


Joe Kent (@joekent16jan19)

After much reflection, I have decided to resign from my position as Director of the National Counterterrorism Center, effective today.

I cannot in good conscience support the ongoing war in Iran. Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation, and it is clear that we started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful America

This is genuinely inexcusable. Everyone expected this. People across the political spectrum screamed from the rooftops about this possibility. So Trump is either lying or so insulated from reliable information he didn’t know this would happen. Two extremely bad possibilities.


Acyn (@Acyn)

Trump: They weren't supposed to go after all these other countries in the Middle East. So they hit Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait. Nobody expected that. We were shocked

People often say "this is not a partisan issue" about issues that are, actually, partisan. But in Texas, this one isn't. Anyone who has ever been to Big Bend knows you don't need a wall, especially not in this area. We are about to lose something unbelievably special for NO gain

This is all about to happen despite the fact a bipartisan group of sheriffs, every local Republican from Hudspeth down to Brewster county, and even the most MAGA & pro-Trump voters in the area oppose it. Only @GregAbbott_TX or @SenMullin can stop it now nitter.net/WestTxStringer/status/…


Matt Stringer (@WestTxStringer)

New: A bipartisan coalition of Texas border sheriffs sign a joint letter of opposition to the construction of a border wall in Big Bend National Park, and are urging federa

So now... the wall is happening, and the most rugged, pristine lands in the lower 48 are about to be destroyed. Along with my family's river and horseback business, and thousands of other jobs in this unbelievably special place.  readtangle.com/trump-border-…
